economic_notes: Heart Lake Construction Limited Partnership, Heart Lake Truck Stop Ltd., Wapahki Energy Ltd., Heart Lake Natural Resource Development Inc. accounted for by equity method. Also 25% interest in Four Lakes Precision Drilling LP and Four Lakes Drilling Corporation, and 50% interest in Savanna Energy Limited Partnership #9.
notes: Audit report dated October 6, 2021 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 - significant delay. Four business enterprises accounted for by equity method (not consolidated). Trust funds held separately: Capital $1,065,825 and Revenue $27,141. Net deficit of $1,228,250 for the year. Net financial position is a net debt of $1,400,606. Accounts payable includes $189,216 owed to Heart Lake Construction Limited Partnership. current_liabilities computed as bank indebtedness $438,729 + accounts payable $2,269,332 + accounts payable HLCLP $189,216 = $2,897,277 (deferred revenue kept separate). OSR computed as total revenue $7,911,313 minus ISC $3,036,732 minus Health Canada $985,890 minus ASETS $252,786 minus Province of Alberta $120,000 minus CMHC $96,405 = $3,419,500 approximately; Band Trust Funds $200,000 treated as other revenue.
